name: Xinyang Maojian Group Limited
summary: Xinyang Maojian Group Limited, an investment holding company, generates and supplies heat and power in the People's Republic of China. The company supplies heat for residential use; produces and sells calcium carbide, vinyl acetate, and polyvinyl-chloride; and distributes and supplies tea leaves under the Xinyang Maojian Tea Leaves brand through the e-commerce platform. It also engages in the construction and monitoring of public facilities; and provision of municipal engineering construction, and administrative and consultancy services, as well as sells beverages. The company was formerly known as China Zenith Chemical Group Limited and changed its name to Xinyang Maojian Group Limited in October 2018. Xinyang Maojian Group Limited is headquartered in Wanchai, Hong Kong.
